description_long: This is a bag of Smith's potato chips, featuring a distinctive yellow packaging with a large blue diamond-shaped logo on the front. The front of the bag prominently displays a jar of Vegemite and several ridged potato chips, indicating a Vegemite-flavored variety. The packaging includes a 'Limited Edition' red badge in the top right corner and a 'New' green badge on the right side, with additional text highlighting reduced saturated fat content. The back of the bag is less detailed, showing a mirrored version of the front design with reversed text. The bag is made of a flexible, glossy plastic material, typical for snack packaging, and is filled with air to protect the chips inside. The overall shape is a slightly bulging, pillow-style bag, sealed at the top and bottom.
description: A yellow, glossy plastic bag of Smith's Vegemite-flavored potato chips with bold branding and promotional graphics.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Smith's logo, Vegemite jar, potato chips, and prominent 'Limited Edition' and 'New' badges.
description_view_1: Top-down view revealing the sealed, crimped edges and the bag's pillow-like bulge, with branding partially visible.
description_view_2: Back view with mirrored branding and text, less detailed than the front, but still showing the main design elements.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view highlighting the bag's sealed seam and the continuation of the yellow color and graphics.
attribute_brand_logo: A blue diamond-shaped Smith's logo with white and red text, located prominently on the front and back of the bag.
attribute_flavor_indication: A jar labeled 'VEGEMITE' and images of potato chips on the front, with the word 'Vegemite' clearly visible.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Text on the front indicates '75% less saturated fat', but no detailed nutrition facts panel is visible.
attribute_promotional_graphics: A red 'Limited Edition' badge in the top right corner and a green 'New' badge on the right side of the front.
